mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the unemployment rate above 6.5% signals weakening labor market conditions that reduce consumer spending, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when UNRATE exceeds 6.5%, or the Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly increase in real GDP (GDPC1) above 2% signals stronger economic growth, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 60d returns in > 60% of quarters with GDPC1 growth > 2%, or the Rank IC is below 0.02 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and falling interest rates (FEDFUNDS) create a 'stagflationary' environment that depresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 2.5% and FEDFUNDS < 1%, or the interaction effect's Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 0.5% signals stronger manufacturing activity, boosting corporate profits and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 5d returns in > 60% of INDPRO growth periods, or the Rank IC is below 0.02 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in housing starts (HOUST) below 1,000 thousand units signals weak demand for residential construction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when HOUST < 1000, or the Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in payroll employment (PAYEMS) and decline in unemployment (UNRATE) signals a strong labor market, boosting consumer confidence and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS > 100k and UNRATE < 6%, or the interaction effect's Rank IC is below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in real sales (RSAFS) above 1% signals stronger consumer demand, boosting corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 20d returns in > 60% of RSAFS growth periods, or the Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year window.
